reviewRun.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied when this lane verifies direct evidence refs; otherwise leave evidenceStatus=unknown.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Reviewed as a packaging/adoption contract claim; this lane did not verify a direct install or host-repo materialization artifact.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Prove with a deterministic install or adoption fixture that checks repo-local adapter, skill, prompt, and routing files are materialized and remain checked in.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Reviewed as a CLI/runtime fixture-path claim; this lane did not run or cite a direct fixture-runtime proof packet.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Prove with deterministic coverage for `cautilus eval test --runtime fixture` and adapter-owned fixture results through the normal eval packet path.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Reviewed as an install and distribution claim; this lane did not verify the installer, binary, and bundled skill together as direct evidence.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Prove with an install smoke or doctor readiness fixture that starts from the binary and verifies the bundled skill is installed without a copied scaffold.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Reviewed as documentation for the scenario-normalization command path; this lane did not verify a direct scenario output packet.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Prove with deterministic scenario normalization or proposal tests that produce reopenable proposal candidates from chatbot input.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Reviewed as a quoted agent prompt example rather than an independent product claim.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Exclude quoted `Input (For Agent)` examples from claim candidates or attach them only as context to the surrounding scenario-proposal claim.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Reviewed as a scenario-proposal workflow contract; this lane did not verify direct proposal or render artifacts.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Prove with deterministic scenario proposal and render coverage that the JSON can be reopened and the human promotion decision remains explicit.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Reviewed as a multi-turn skill/agent episode claim; this lane did not verify direct audit-backed eval outputs.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Prove with the existing dev/skill audit-backed fixtures for first-scan, refresh-flow, review-prepare, and reviewer-launch behavior.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Reviewed as a renderer and static-artifact claim; this lane did not verify direct HTML render outputs.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Prove with deterministic HTML renderer specs or tests that the relevant packets produce browser-readable static pages.
